def negative_sync_and_async_contracts_mixed_on_same_interface_family():
    rule_id = "sync_and_async_contracts_mixed_on_same_interface_family"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag interface families that mix sync and async methods without a clear separation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
